nodes.name: 库页岛蝗莺
nodes.summary: 库页岛蝗莺（Helopsaltes amnicola）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如库页岛蝗莺。

nodes.name: Helopsaltes
nodes.summary: Helopsaltes（Helopsaltes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如苍眉蝗莺、库页岛蝗莺、东亚蝗莺等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: 库页岛蝗莺
nodes.summary: Sakhalin grasshopper warbler (Helopsaltes amnicola), is a species of bird in the family Locustellidae; it was formerly included in the "Old World warbler" assemblage. Distribution and habitat This small passerine bird breeds on Sakhalin, the southern Kuril Islands and Hokkaido. It is a species found in lowland and coastal regions, nesting in forests or thickets. Description The adult has an unstreaked olive-brown back, uniformly grey breast and buff underparts, with unmottled dull orange undertail coverts. The song is a short phrase, loud and distinctive; nothing like the insect-like reeling of European Locustella species, and more musical than that of Pallas's grasshopper warbler. References
